commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. Only opengoose-types, opengoose-profiles, opengoose-persistence can be tested in sandboxed env.

completed_work.description: Added 9 edge-case tests across opengoose-types and opengoose-profiles

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - needs DB and EventBus, complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic, existing tests only cover basics
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-secrets keyring_backend MockStore patterns could be extended
